claimText: Article 117(3): Bills involving expenditure from Consolidated Fund of India require prior President’s recommendation.
evidenceExcerpt: Article 117(3): Bills involving expenditure from Consolidated Fund of India require prior President’s recommendation.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: About Finance Bill and Money Bill
evidenceExcerpt: About Finance Bill and Money Bill
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - Finance Bill can be introduced only in Lok Sabha. Rajya Sabha can only recommend amendments in Bill, it cannot amend or reject.
evidenceExcerpt: - Finance Bill can be introduced only in Lok Sabha. Rajya Sabha can only recommend amendments in Bill, it cannot amend or reject.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - Bill has to be passed by Parliament within 75 days of its introduction.
evidenceExcerpt: - Bill has to be passed by Parliament within 75 days of its introduction.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - As a finance bill is a money bill so no joint sitting of two houses is allowed with regard to a finance bill under Article 108.
evidenceExcerpt: - As a finance bill is a money bill so no joint sitting of two houses is allowed with regard to a finance bill under Article 108.
